title: Facilitator Guide — Day 16 — Platform Integration
prepChecklist: Confirm Playbook Blueprint Business Model + Revenue Model sections are accessible
Confirm FEC Week 4 integration fields (Platform, Revenue Engine, Agency Growth) are live
Brief mentors: morning is narrative + reveal; afternoon is Blueprint + FEC workshop

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Scenes 1–3 — Welcome, Journey So Far, Missing Piece
sessionFlow.notes: Emotional arc: pride → curiosity. Pause on What's missing?

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Scenes 4–7 — Mindset, Enterprise reveal, AIA Platform, Value Flow
sessionFlow.notes: Poll room on Scene 5 before reveal. Walk six platform pillars.

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Scenes 8–9 — Platform Integration + Blueprint Evolves
sessionFlow.notes: Key quote: Weeks 1–3 = what business; Week 4 = how it works.

sessionFlow.activity: Workshop Scene 10 — Blueprint Business Model + Revenue Model
sessionFlow.notes: Playbook open. Mentors circulate. No compensation deep-dive today.
Week 3 foundation stays. Add Platform, Revenue Engine, Agency Growth.
Three reflection questions: Client Experience vs Venture Proposition; Winning Strategy; Growth Engines and scale.

debriefQuestions: Do participants feel their Week 1–3 work is still valid?
Can they articulate platform integration in one sentence?
Are Blueprint and FEC updates specific — not generic?
commonPitfalls: Framing AIA as employer instead of platform
Using 'install the engine' language — say platform integration instead
Letting workshop become product pitch instead of business model design
coachingTips: Celebrate artifacts from Weeks 1–3 before introducing platform
Use Scene 8 four-box visual as the day's anchor image
